import { OperatorFunction, ObservableInputTuple } from '../types'; export declare function withLatestFrom<T, O extends unknown[]>(...inputs: [...ObservableInputTuple<O>]): OperatorFunction<T, [T, ...O]>; export declare function withLatestFrom<T, O extends unknown[], R>(...inputs: [...ObservableInputTuple<O>, (...value: [T, ...O]) => R]): OperatorFunction<T, R>; //# sourceMappingURL=withLatestFrom.d.ts.map
